About Me

Building at the Intersection of Dev & Ops

I have 13+ years of working experience in the telecom sector, currently working as a Principal DevOps Engineer at Tkxel. I'm also a professional Microsoft database trainer at EVS institute.

I'm a self-motivated agile software developer with expertise in business flow automation, ETL processes, enterprise-level progressive web app development, and improving web UI & UX. My domain knowledge spans Telecom, Education, Real Estate & E-commerce.

Outside of work, I'm a father of 2 and a Raspberry Pi project enthusiast.

Core Competencies

Azure Cloud T-SQL C# .NET SSIS GitHub Actions Docker Terraform Linux PowerShell ASP.NET Core PostgreSQL REST APIs Azure DevOps Python

Portfolio

Notable Projects

🎤

Backend Voice of Customer

Backend web application for capturing and processing customer feedback in a telecom environment.

ASP.Net Core C# SQL Server
🔄

Restoration on Commitment API

RESTful API service for automated customer service restoration based on commitment workflows.

RESTful API C# Azure
🏠

Service Home Delivery Web App

Full-stack web application for managing telecom service home delivery requests and scheduling.

ASP.Net Core C# T-SQL
📊

Digital Business Solution ETL

Enterprise ETL pipeline for digital business solutions using SSIS packages with automated scheduling.

SSIS T-SQL SQL Server
📋

Blocking & Restoration via CSV

Console application for bulk telecom service management through CSV-driven automation workflows.

C# Console .NET Core CSV Processing
💳

Credit Monitoring Web App

Internal MVC application for real-time credit rating monitoring and enforcement of telecom services.

ASP.NET MVC C# SQL Server
